content: If a card gains a characteristic (trait, keyword, or ability text), the card functions as if it possesses it. Gained characteristics are not considered printed on the card.
A game element is a component or person involved in playing Marvel Champions: Cards, Decks, Discard Piles, Hands (of cards), Hit Point Dials, Players, Tokens.

While a minion with the guard keyword is engaged with a player, that player cannot use cards they control to attack a villain without this keyword.

  • The guard keyword is equivalent to:
    The engaged player cannot attack any villain.
